rationale: Matches existing (rc, obj)-internal / int-external precedents in cli/verify_kinds.py::_run() and cli/verify_decisions.py::_run(); zero of the 19 existing test_cli_harness.py int-assertions change; no cmd_* function in the repo returns a dataclass externally today.
rule: Option B — (rc, EvalReport) tuple return from _evaluate_and_report(), cmd_* stays -> int
alternatives_rejected: Option A: add rc:int field to a HarnessEvalOutcome dataclass returned externally by cmd_skill/cmd_cmd/cmd_mcp/cmd_prompt — breaks the codebase-wide cmd_* -> int convention, introduces a novel 'rc' field name (convention is exit_code), and forces 19 test rewrites plus 5 main_harness dispatch-line changes.
